consent_fields.revocation: STOP by SMS or cancel in Lovable

messages.first_sms: Grace here, the AI funeral-arrangements advocate for this demo. Would you rather continue by text or receive a call? Reply TEXT or CALL. Messages and calls may be transcribed and processed by our service providers. Reply STOP to stop.
messages.stop_confirmation: You're unsubscribed. Grace will not contact you again. Reply HELP for info.
messages.help: Grace is an AI funeral-arrangements advocate for a controlled hackathon demo using synthetic data. Messages/calls may be transcribed and processed by Twilio, ElevenLabs, and OpenAI. Reply STOP to stop, TEXT to continue by text, or CALL for a voice call.
messages.reask_channel: Would you prefer TEXT or CALL?
messages.confirmation_gate: I'll compare cremation with a private family goodbye, Spanish-language support, hospital pickup near 94304, and a memorial later. I will not share a budget. You've allowed me to use a verified competing quote to seek better non-binding terms, but I cannot book or authorize anything. Reply YES or EDIT.

consumer_updates.after_call_launch: I've started three provider calls. I'll text when I have comparable results.
consumer_updates.callback_or_failure: One provider requested a callback; two quotes are complete. I'm continuing.
consumer_updates.quotes_audited: I have three outcomes. One low quote omitted fees; I asked for clarification.
consumer_updates.report_ready: I've compared the providers and have your ranked results. Reply CALL to have the Grace Closer Agent walk you through them.
consumer_updates.tie: Two providers are effectively tied. The Grace Closer Agent can explain the price/fit trade-off without forcing one choice.

voice_openings.intake: This is Grace, an AI assistant for a synthetic funeral-arrangements demo. This call is transcribed and processed by our service providers. May I continue and record this conversation for the demo?
voice_openings.caller: Hello, I'm Grace, an AI assistant calling on behalf of a family to request and compare funeral pricing. This is a controlled hackathon demo using synthetic case details. The call will be transcribed for the demo. Do you consent to continue and be transcribed?
voice_openings.closer_provider: Hello, I'm Grace, an AI assistant representing a family, following up on your funeral pricing quote. This is a synthetic hackathon demo and the call is transcribed. Do you consent to continue?
voice_openings.closer_consumer: This is the Grace Closer Agent. I have your ranked provider results. May I walk you through them?

operational_replies.consent_declined_provider: Understood, I won't record. Thank you for your time. Goodbye.
operational_replies.robot_question: Yes, I'm an AI assistant calling on behalf of a family for this synthetic demo. May I continue with the pricing questions?
operational_replies.payment_pressure: I can't make payments or commit on the family's behalf. Could you send a written quote instead? Thank you.
